subject: chore(audit): codebase audit fixes — logger migration, doc updates, stale doc cleanup
body:
- Replace 241 unguarded console.* calls with logger.* across 29 files
  (logger gates log/info behind __DEV__, always allows error/warn)
- Preserve console.* in app/+html.tsx inline <script> blocks (browser
  context outside React/bundler where logger module is unavailable)
- Fix README.md chat code count: 2,304 → ~42,600 (matches actual
  199 adjectives × 214 nouns in wordLists.ts)
- Update CLAUDE.md: RLS policies reflect security hardening split
  (chat UPDATE → "join open chats" + "participants update own fields"),
  notification function now uses shared secret auth and generic message
  preview, new database constraints documented (edit_time_window,
  display_name_length)
- Delete stale docs/CODE_QUALITY_SECURITY_REPORT.md (Dec 2025, pre-
  security-hardening) and docs/CODE_REVIEW_AUDIT_2026_03.md (resolved)
- Remove CODE_QUALITY_SECURITY_REPORT.md from CLAUDE.md project
  structure and documentation tables

Tags: code-quality, cleanup, documentation, logger, audit
